stainless_steel_304.name: Stainless Steel 304
stainless_steel_304.description: High strength, corrosion resistant, good for turbine shafts.

aluminum_6061.name: Aluminum 6061-T6
aluminum_6061.description: Lightweight, good for turbine blades but lower fatigue limit.

pvc_plastic.name: PVC Plastic
pvc_plastic.description: Very cheap, lightweight, but brittle and weak under high torque.
